channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DEVIT] Dev IT Transfers ByteSIGNER and Talligence to Byte Technosys, Aims to Improve Operational Efficiency
item.description:
Dev Information Technology Ltd. (DEV IT) has announced the transfer of its product businesses, ByteSIGNER and Talligence, to Byte Technosys Private Limited, an associate company. This move is aimed at enhancing operational efficiency, eliminating redundancies, and improving go-to-market alignment. The transaction is a standalone slump sale for a cash consideration of ₹ 11.90 Crore and is expected to be completed by September 30, 2026. Byte Technosys Private Limited is engaged in IT infrastructure management services, software development, and IT consultancy. This strategic realignment is expected to support margin improvement through cost efficiencies and strengthen oversight through a simplified structure. It allows the product businesses to scale within a more focused environment, while DEV IT can concentrate on its core capabilities and pursue long-term growth opportunities with greater agility and clarity.

  • Dev IT to transfer ByteSIGNER and Talligence to Byte Technosys Private Limited
  • Transaction aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and improving go-to-market alignment
  • Standalone slump sale for a cash consideration of ₹ 11.90 Crore
  • Byte Technosys engaged in IT infrastructure management services, software development, and IT consultancy
  • Strategic realignment to support margin improvement and strengthen oversight

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Information Technology Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [ZUARIIND] Zuari Industries' SPE Division Achieves Highest-Ever Sugarcane Crushing in FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The SPE Division of Zuari Industries Limited has achieved its highest-ever sugarcane crushing of 159.7 lakh quintals in FY26. This performance was driven by improved efficiency, higher capacity utilisation, increased cane availability, and an early start to the crushing cycle. The mill is expected to gain a head start for FY27 with plans to extend crushing operations into April.

  • Zuari Industries' SPE Division achieves highest-ever sugarcane crushing of 159.7 lakh quintals in FY26
  • Performance driven by improved efficiency, higher capacity utilisation, increased cane availability, and early start to the crushing cycle
  • Mill expects to gain a head start for FY27 with plans to extend crushing operations into April
  • Zuari Industries continues focus on operational discipline
  • SPE Division operates integrated facilities for sugar production, green power generation, and biofuels

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zuari Industries Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SPVGLOBAL] SPV Global Trading Ltd. Announces Extra Ordinary General Meeting on 23rd April 2026
item.description:
SPV Global Trading Ltd. has announced an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on Thursday, 23rd April 2026 at 03:00 P.M. The meeting will take place at the company's registered office in Mumbai. The EGM includes two special resolutions: approval of the remuneration of Mr. Balkrishna Binani, Managing Director, and approval of Related Party Transactions. The remuneration includes a salary of ₹. 13,50,000/- p.m. and perquisites as per the company's rules. The EGM will also discuss the alteration and variation of terms and conditions of the said appointment and/or remuneration. The notice of EGM is available on the company's website.

  • Extra Ordinary General Meeting scheduled for 23rd April 2026
  • Approval of remuneration for Managing Director, Mr. Balkrishna Binani
  • Approval of Related Party Transactions
  • Discussion on alteration and variation of terms and conditions of appointment and remuneration
  • Notice of EGM available on company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SPV Global Trading Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDIANB] Indian Bank Reports 13.1% YoY Growth in Total Business as of 31st March 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indian Bank has released its provisional business figures as of 31st March 2026, showing a 13.1% Year-over-Year (YoY) growth in total business. The total business stood at Rs. 14.98 Lakh Crore, up from Rs. 13.25 Lakh Crore in the same period last year. The total deposits also saw an increase of 12.6% YoY, amounting to Rs. 8.30 Lakh Crore. The Savings Bank (SB) Deposits grew by 10.3% YoY to Rs. 2.68 Lakh Crore, and Current Account Deposits (CAD) increased by 20.0% YoY to Rs. 0.48 Lakh Crore. The CASA% (Domestic) stood at 39.86%. The Gross Advances saw a growth of 13.6% YoY, amounting to Rs. 6.68 Lakh Crore, and the Risk Assessment Management (RAM) (Domestic) grew by 15.7% YoY to Rs. 4.06 Lakh Crore.

  • 13.1% YoY growth in total business
  • 12.6% YoY increase in total deposits
  • 10.3% YoY growth in SB Deposits
  • 20.0% YoY increase in CAD
  • 13.6% YoY growth in Gross Advances

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN BANK | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [TVSMOTOR] TVS Motor Company registers highest ever sales in FY 2025-26 with 24% growth
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TVS Motor Company, a global leader in the two and three-wheeler segments, recorded monthly sales of 519,358 units in March 2026 with a growth of 25%. Total sales in FY 2025-26 grew by 24% at 5.9 Million units, marking the highest ever sales in a fiscal year. The company also reported the highest ever sales in a quarter (Q4 FY 2025-26) at 1.6 Million units. Total sales in March 2026 increased by 25%, with International Business sales growth at 25%.

  • TVS Motor Company registered its highest ever sales in FY 2025-26 with a 24% growth
  • Total sales in FY 2025-26 grew by 24% to 5.9 Million units
  • Highest ever sales in a Quarter (Q4 FY 2025-26) at 1.6 Million units
  • Total sales in March 2026 increased by 25%
  • International Business sales growth at 25%

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TVS MOTOR COMPANY LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [POWERGRID] Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd Announces Promotion of Two Chief General Managers as Executive Directors
item.description:
Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd has announced the promotion of Shri Gyaneshwar Prasad Payasi and Shri Pradeep Kumar as Executive Directors (ED) with effect from 1st April, 2026. Shri Gyaneshwar Prasad Payasi, Executive Director (CMD-Coordination cell), has over three decades of experience in PESM, CMD Coordination, TBCB, CMG and project execution functions. He has led major operational and strategic assignments and has been instrumental in asset monetization and laying down transmission lines for evacuation of power from remote locations. Shri Pradeep Kumar, Executive Director (CTDS-AP), has nearly three decades of experience in asset management, substation maintenance, and consultancy assignments. He is currently heading a strategically significant project of the Government of India in Arunachal Pradesh.

  • Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd has announced the promotion of two Chief General Managers as Executive Directors.
  • Shri Gyaneshwar Prasad Payasi has been promoted to Executive Director (CMD-Coordination cell) and has over three decades of experience in PESM, CMD Coordination, TBCB, CMG and project execution functions.
  • Shri Pradeep Kumar has been promoted to Executive Director (CTDS-AP) and has nearly three decades of experience in asset management, substation maintenance, and consultancy assignments.
  • Shri Gyaneshwar Prasad Payasi has led major operational and strategic assignments and has been instrumental in asset monetization and laying down transmission lines for evacuation of power from remote locations.
  • Shri Pradeep Kumar is currently heading a strategically significant project of the Government of India in Arunachal Pradesh.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POWER GRID CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PVSL] Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd Subsidiary Commences Operations of State-of-the-art JLR 3S Facility in Nagpur
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Popular Vehicles & Services Limited, a leading fully integrated automotive dealership player in India, has announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Popular Autoworks Pvt Ltd, has commenced operations at a new state-of-the-art 3S facility (Showroom, Workshop, and Pre-owned Car Section) for Jaguar Land Rover (JLR) vehicles in Nagpur, Maharashtra. The facility, located at MIDC, Hingna Road, Nagpur, is designed to deliver a premium ownership experience to JLR customers across the Vidarbha region and surrounding areas. The workshop is equipped with 8 service bays and has the capacity to service approximately 50 vehicles per month. The total investment in the facility is approximately ₹15 crore.

  • Popular Autoworks Pvt Ltd, a subsidiary of Popular Vehicles & Services Limited, has commenced operations at a new state-of-the-art 3S facility for Jaguar Land Rover vehicles in Nagpur, Maharashtra.
  • The facility is designed to deliver a premium ownership experience to JLR customers across the Vidarbha region and surrounding areas.
  • The workshop is equipped with 8 service bays and has the capacity to service approximately 50 vehicles per month.
  • The total investment in the facility is approximately ₹15 crore.
  • This expansion strengthens the Company’s presence beyond southern India and reinforces the company’s strategy to grow its luxury segment footprint across key urban and emerging markets.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Popular Vehicles and Services Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [WAAREEENER] Waaree Energies' Total GST Demand Significantly Reduced to ₹23,62,494 for FY 2017-18 and ₹25,86,704 for FY 2018-19
item.description:
Waaree Energies Ltd. has received an order from the Joint Commissioner of State Tax, IV Bandra, Mumbai (Appellate Authority), significantly reducing the total GST demand for the financial years 2017-18 and 2018-19. The demand was reduced to ₹23,62,494 and ₹25,86,704 from ₹6,95,25,249 and ₹6,02,70,052, respectively. Additionally, the Assistant Commissioner of State Tax, Maharashtra, issued an assessment order under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 for the tax period April 2019 to March 2020, amounting to ₹7,52,36,584. The company is evaluating and addressing this matter, including filing an appeal before the appropriate authority if needed.

  • Total GST demand for FY 2017-18 and 2018-19 significantly reduced
  • Order issued by Joint Commissioner of State Tax, IV Bandra, Mumbai (Appellate Authority)
  • Assessment order under Section 74 of Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 for tax period April 2019 to March 2020
  • Company evaluating and addressing the matter
  • Potential filing of an appeal before the appropriate authority

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Waaree Energies Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [AGIIL] AGI Infra Ltd Secures License for Premium Residential Project 'Utopia by AGI' in New Chandigarh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AGI Infra Ltd has announced that it has received a license from the Greater Mohali Area Development Authority (GMADA) for the development of a Group Housing Colony named 'Utopia by AGI'. The project, located in a premium residential area in New Chandigarh, comprises a saleable area of approximately 31,93,697 sqft and houses 661 residential flats, including 3BHK, 4BHK, and 5BHK flats. The project also includes thoughtfully planned amenities and conveniences for its residents. This is AGI Infra's maiden project in New Chandigarh. The license, valid until 30.03.2031, is expected to enable the company to increase its revenue and profits from the sale of flats in this project.

  • AGI Infra Ltd has received a license from GMADA for the 'Utopia by AGI' project in New Chandigarh
  • The project comprises 661 residential flats, including 3BHK, 4BHK, and 5BHK flats
  • The project is located in a premium residential area and includes thoughtfully planned amenities
  • This is AGI Infra's first project in New Chandigarh
  • The license is valid until 30.03.2031 and is expected to boost the company's revenue and profits

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AGI Infra Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [TELGE] Telge Projects Inc. Domesticated and Renamed to Telge Global Inc.
item.description:
Telge Projects Ltd has announced the domestication of its material subsidiary, Telge Projects Inc., from the State of Virginia to the State of Texas, USA. Alongside this change, the subsidiary's name has been altered to Telge Global Inc. The company has secured necessary approvals from relevant authorities in both states for this transition.

  • Telge Projects Inc. has been domesticated from Virginia to Texas, USA.
  • The name of the subsidiary has been changed to Telge Global Inc.
  • All necessary approvals have been obtained from relevant authorities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Telge Projects Ltd | Category: Business Update
